functions.name: addCatchAllRoute
functions.description: Adds a catch-all route for a cluster, endpoint, resource, or string destination target.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The target cluster, endpoint, resource, or string destination for this route.

functions.name: addClusterFromEndpoint
functions.description: Adds a cluster for an endpoint reference.

parameters.name: endpoint
parameters.description: The endpoint target for this cluster.

functions.name: addClusterFromExternalService
functions.description: Adds a cluster for an external service resource.

parameters.name: externalService
parameters.description: The external service used by this cluster.

functions.name: addClusterFromResource
functions.description: Adds a cluster for a resource that supports service discovery.

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: The resource target for this cluster.

functions.name: addClusterWithDestination
functions.description: Adds a cluster from a single destination.

parameters.name: clusterName
parameters.description: The name of the cluster.

parameters.name: destination
parameters.description: The destination used by this cluster.

functions.name: addClusterWithDestinations
functions.description: Adds a cluster from multiple destinations.

parameters.name: clusterName
parameters.description: The name of the cluster.

parameters.name: destinations
parameters.description: The destinations used by this cluster.

functions.name: addRoute
functions.description: Adds a route for a cluster, endpoint, resource, or string destination target.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The path to match for this route.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The target cluster, endpoint, resource, or string destination for this route.

functions.name: addYarp
functions.description: Adds a YARP container to the application model.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.

functions.name: publishWithStaticFiles
functions.description: In publish mode, generates a Dockerfile that copies static files from the specified resource into /app/wwwroot.

parameters.name: resourceWithFiles
parameters.description: The resource with container files.

functions.name: withConfiguration
functions.description: Configure the YARP resource.

parameters.name: configurationBuilder
parameters.description: The delegate to configure YARP.

functions.name: withForwarderRequestConfig
functions.description: Set the forwarder request configuration for the cluster.

functions.name: withHealthCheckConfig
functions.description: Set the health check configuration for the cluster.

functions.name: withHostHttpsPort
functions.description: Configures the host HTTPS port that the YARP resource is exposed on instead of using randomly assigned port. This will only have effect if an HTTPS endpoint is configured on the YARP resource due to TLS termination being enabled.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: The port to bind on the host. If `null` is used random port will be assigned.

functions.name: withHostPort
functions.description: Configures the host port that the YARP resource is exposed on instead of using randomly assigned port.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: The port to bind on the host. If `null` is used random port will be assigned.

functions.name: withHttpClientConfig
functions.description: Set the HTTP client configuration for the cluster.

functions.name: withLoadBalancingPolicy
functions.description: Set the LoadBalancingPolicy for the cluster.

functions.name: withMatch
functions.description: Set the parameters used to match requests.

functions.name: withMatchHeaders
functions.description: Only match requests that contain all of these headers.

functions.name: withMatchHosts
functions.description: Only match requests with the given Host header. Supports wildcards and ports. For unicode host names, do not use punycode.

functions.name: withMatchMethods
functions.description: Only match requests that use these optional HTTP methods. E.g. GET, POST.

functions.name: withMatchPath
functions.description: Only match requests with the given Path pattern.

functions.name: withMatchRouteQueryParameter
functions.description: Only match requests that contain all of these query parameters.

functions.name: withMaxRequestBodySize
functions.description: Set the MaxRequestBodySize for the destination

functions.name: withMetadata
functions.description: Set the Metadata for the cluster.

functions.name: withMetadata
functions.description: Set the Metadata of the destination

functions.name: withOrder
functions.description: Set the order for the destination

functions.name: withSessionAffinityConfig
functions.description: Set the session affinity configuration for the cluster.

functions.name: withStaticFiles
functions.description: Enables static file serving in the YARP resource. Static files are served from the wwwroot folder.

functions.name: withTransform
functions.description: Add a new transform to the destination.

functions.name: withTransformClientCertHeader
functions.description: Adds the transform which will set the given header with the Base64 encoded client certificate.

functions.name: withTransformCopyRequestHeaders
functions.description: Adds the transform which will enable or suppress copying request headers to the proxy request.

functions.name: withTransformCopyResponseHeaders
functions.description: Adds the transform which will enable or suppress copying response headers to the client response.

functions.name: withTransformCopyResponseTrailers
functions.description: Adds the transform which will enable or suppress copying response trailers to the client response.

functions.name: withTransformForwarded
functions.description: Adds the transform which will add the Forwarded header as defined by [RFC 7239](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7239).
functions.signature: withTransformForwarded(useHost?: boolean, useProto?: boolean, forFormat?: NodeFormat, byFormat?: NodeFormat, action?: ForwardedTransformActions): YarpRoute

functions.name: withTransformHttpMethodChange
functions.description: Adds the transform that will replace the HTTP method if it matches.

functions.name: withTransformPathPrefix
functions.description: Adds the transform which will prefix the request path with the given value.

parameters.name: prefix
parameters.description: The path prefix to add.

functions.name: withTransformPathRemovePrefix
functions.description: Adds the transform which will remove the matching prefix from the request path.

parameters.name: prefix
parameters.description: The matching prefix to remove.

functions.name: withTransformPathRouteValues
functions.description: Adds the transform which will set the request path with route values.

parameters.name: pattern
parameters.description: The route pattern to apply.

functions.name: withTransformPathSet
functions.description: Adds the transform which sets the request path with the given value.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The path value to set.

functions.name: withTransformQueryRemoveKey
functions.description: Adds the transform that will remove the given query key.

functions.name: withTransformQueryRouteValue
functions.description: Adds the transform that will append or set the query parameter from a route value.
functions.signature: withTransformQueryRouteValue(queryKey: string, routeValueKey: string, append?: boolean): YarpRoute

functions.name: withTransformQueryValue
functions.description: Adds the transform that will append or set the query parameter from the given value.
functions.signature: withTransformQueryValue(queryKey: string, value: string, append?: boolean): YarpRoute

functions.name: withTransformRequestHeader
functions.description: Adds the transform which will append or set the request header.
functions.signature: withTransformRequestHeader(headerName: string, value: string, append?: boolean): YarpRoute

functions.name: withTransformRequestHeaderRemove
functions.description: Adds the transform which will remove the request header.

functions.name: withTransformRequestHeaderRouteValue
functions.description: Adds the transform which will append or set the request header from a route value.
functions.signature: withTransformRequestHeaderRouteValue(headerName: string, routeValueKey: string, append?: boolean): YarpRoute

functions.name: withTransformRequestHeadersAllowed
functions.description: Adds the transform which will only copy the allowed request headers. Other transforms that modify or append to existing headers may be affected if not included in the allow list.

functions.name: withTransformResponseHeader
functions.description: Adds the transform which will append or set the response header.
functions.signature: withTransformResponseHeader(headerName: string, value: string, append?: boolean, condition?: ResponseCondition): YarpRoute

functions.name: withTransformResponseHeaderRemove
functions.description: Adds the transform which will remove the response header.

functions.name: withTransformResponseHeadersAllowed
functions.description: Adds the transform which will only copy the allowed response headers. Other transforms that modify or append to existing headers may be affected if not included in the allow list.

functions.name: withTransformResponseTrailer
functions.description: Adds the transform which will append or set the response trailer.
functions.signature: withTransformResponseTrailer(headerName: string, value: string, append?: boolean, condition?: ResponseCondition): YarpRoute

functions.name: withTransformResponseTrailerRemove
functions.description: Adds the transform which will remove the response trailer.

functions.name: withTransformResponseTrailersAllowed
functions.description: Adds the transform which will only copy the allowed response trailers. Other transforms that modify or append to existing trailers may be affected if not included in the allow list.

functions.name: withTransforms
functions.description: Set the Transforms of the destination

functions.name: withTransformUseOriginalHostHeader
functions.description: Adds the transform which will copy the incoming request Host header to the proxy request.

functions.name: withTransformXForwarded
functions.description: Adds the transform which will add X-Forwarded-* headers.
functions.signature: withTransformXForwarded(headerPrefix?: string, xDefault?: ForwardedTransformActions, xFor?: ForwardedTransformActions, xHost?: ForwardedTransformActions, xProto?: ForwardedTransformActions, xPrefix?: ForwardedTransformActions): YarpRoute

dtoTypes.name: YarpActiveHealthCheckConfig
dtoTypes.description: Represents active health check configuration for a YARP cluster.

fields.name: Enabled
fields.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether active health checks are enabled.

fields.name: Interval
fields.description: Gets or sets the health check interval.

fields.name: Path
fields.description: Gets or sets the health check path.

fields.name: Policy
fields.description: Gets or sets the health check policy.

fields.name: Query
fields.description: Gets or sets the health check query string.

fields.name: Timeout
fields.description: Gets or sets the health check timeout.

dtoTypes.name: YarpForwarderRequestConfig
dtoTypes.description: Represents forwarder request configuration for a YARP cluster.

fields.name: ActivityTimeout
fields.description: Gets or sets the activity timeout.

fields.name: AllowResponseBuffering
fields.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether response buffering is allowed.

fields.name: Version
fields.description: Gets or sets the HTTP version string.

fields.name: VersionPolicy
fields.description: Gets or sets the HTTP version policy.

dtoTypes.name: YarpHealthCheckConfig
dtoTypes.description: Represents health check configuration for a YARP cluster.

fields.name: Active
fields.description: Gets or sets the active health check configuration.

fields.name: AvailableDestinationsPolicy
fields.description: Gets or sets the available destinations policy.

fields.name: Passive
fields.description: Gets or sets the passive health check configuration.

dtoTypes.name: YarpHttpClientConfig
dtoTypes.description: Represents HTTP client configuration for a YARP cluster.

fields.name: DangerousAcceptAnyServerCertificate
fields.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to accept any server certificate.

fields.name: EnableMultipleHttp2Connections
fields.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether multiple HTTP/2 connections are enabled.

fields.name: MaxConnectionsPerServer
fields.description: Gets or sets the maximum connections per server.

fields.name: RequestHeaderEncoding
fields.description: Gets or sets the request header encoding.

fields.name: ResponseHeaderEncoding
fields.description: Gets or sets the response header encoding.

fields.name: SslProtocols
fields.description: Gets or sets the SSL protocols to enable.

fields.name: WebProxy
fields.description: Gets or sets the web proxy configuration.

dtoTypes.name: YarpPassiveHealthCheckConfig
dtoTypes.description: Represents passive health check configuration for a YARP cluster.

fields.name: Enabled
fields.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether passive health checks are enabled.

fields.name: Policy
fields.description: Gets or sets the health check policy.

fields.name: ReactivationPeriod
fields.description: Gets or sets the reactivation period.

dtoTypes.name: YarpRouteHeaderMatch
dtoTypes.description: Represents a header-based route match for a YARP route.

fields.name: Name
fields.description: Gets or sets the header name to match.

fields.name: Values
fields.description: Gets or sets the header values to match.

fields.name: IsCaseSensitive
fields.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the header comparison is case-sensitive.

fields.name: Mode
fields.description: Gets or sets the matching mode for the header comparison.

dtoTypes.name: YarpRouteMatch
dtoTypes.description: Represents route match criteria for a YARP route.

fields.name: Path
fields.description: Gets or sets the path pattern to match.

fields.name: Methods
fields.description: Gets or sets the HTTP methods to match.

fields.name: Hosts
fields.description: Gets or sets the host headers to match.

fields.name: Headers
fields.description: Gets or sets the header match criteria.

fields.name: QueryParameters
fields.description: Gets or sets the query parameter match criteria.

dtoTypes.name: YarpRouteQueryParameterMatch
dtoTypes.description: Represents a query-parameter-based route match for a YARP route.

fields.name: Name
fields.description: Gets or sets the query parameter name to match.

fields.name: Values
fields.description: Gets or sets the query parameter values to match.

fields.name: IsCaseSensitive
fields.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the query parameter comparison is case-sensitive.

fields.name: Mode
fields.description: Gets or sets the matching mode for the query parameter comparison.

dtoTypes.name: YarpSessionAffinityConfig
dtoTypes.description: Represents session affinity configuration for a YARP cluster.

fields.name: AffinityKeyName
fields.description: Gets or sets the affinity key name.

fields.name: Cookie
fields.description: Gets or sets the cookie configuration.

fields.name: Enabled
fields.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether session affinity is enabled.

fields.name: FailurePolicy
fields.description: Gets or sets the failure policy.

fields.name: Policy
fields.description: Gets or sets the session affinity policy.

dtoTypes.name: YarpSessionAffinityCookieConfig
dtoTypes.description: Represents session affinity cookie configuration for a YARP cluster.

fields.name: Domain
fields.description: Gets or sets the cookie domain.

fields.name: Expiration
fields.description: Gets or sets the cookie expiration.

fields.name: HttpOnly
fields.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the cookie is HTTP only.

fields.name: IsEssential
fields.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the cookie is essential.

fields.name: MaxAge
fields.description: Gets or sets the cookie max age.

fields.name: Path
fields.description: Gets or sets the cookie path.

fields.name: SameSite
fields.description: Gets or sets the same-site mode.

fields.name: SecurePolicy
fields.description: Gets or sets the secure policy.

dtoTypes.name: YarpWebProxyConfig
dtoTypes.description: Represents web proxy configuration for a YARP cluster.

fields.name: Address
fields.description: Gets or sets the proxy address.

fields.name: BypassOnLocal
fields.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether local addresses bypass the proxy.

fields.name: UseDefaultCredentials
fields.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the default credentials are used.

enumTypes.name: YarpSslProtocol
enumTypes.description: Specifies the SSL protocols to enable for a YARP cluster. This enum exists because `SslProtocols` includes obsolete members and values that YARP does not accept.
